final_prompt.prompt:
Create an editorial photograph of a tropical resort pool scene overlooking the ocean.

Style/medium: needs a "tropical resort" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Slim Aarons poolside photography, 1970s Caribbean resort postcards, contemporary luxury travel magazine spreads; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include an infinity pool as the focal element, overlooking the ocean
Subject: must include poolside lounge chairs and umbrellas, coconut palm trees
Scene/backdrop: must include the ocean horizon, blue sky with white clouds
Lighting/mood: needs a bright, vacation-ready atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs high-saturation tropical direction — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: 
Avoid:
